prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "单腿靠墙静蹲" (single-leg wall sit) exercise, side view, facing right. Person posture: Athletic person performing a SINGLE-LEG wall sit on the right leg: back, shoulders, and head pressed flat against a vertical wall. Right foot flat on the ground, positioned about a thigh-length out from the wall. Right knee bent at exactly 90 degrees, right thigh parallel to the floor, right shin vertical — supporting all body weight. The LEFT LEG is lifted entirely OFF THE GROUND with the left thigh lifted forward and held parallel to the floor at the same height as the right thigh, left knee bent so the left shin angles forward. Arms hanging at sides or crossed at chest. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. CRITICAL: only the RIGHT FOOT is on the ground, the left foot is in the air; this is the SINGLE-LEG variant of wall sit.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: quadriceps of the supporting (right) leg under heavy isometric load. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: gluteus maximus of the supporting leg, hip flexors of the lifted leg, and core. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "股四头肌" pointing to the quadriceps of the supporting leg; "臀大肌" pointing to the gluteus maximus of the supporting leg; "髂腰肌 / 核心" pointing to the hip flexors of the lifted leg and the core. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
